textByHash.10df49f88d207bc182197986bdb1648e902a14a5: For Sigli eh? Well, I made his bow in the first place, so I'll be able to select the right string for you... just one small problem.
textByHash.2c74bc8e7055f8496e8b9b14d2a35d1add4e354f: No. Weapons are my speciality. Not politics.
textByHash.36e77d15f3adda2be864b82aa84dfc0560b9eb6e: Sorry. I can't sell weapons to outerlanders. Wouldn't be right. Against our beliefs.
textByHash.3a4865e86afcf511f238fdd8f0f8bb0cb9f0a1c4: Hello again . Come to see what's for sale?
textByHash.4e32054caecb56c2b9e5be5d4a1de30466864911: Aye, I have a few in stock. What would an outerlander be wanting with equipment like that?
textByHash.50605dad469ad9a1d524a2882667ae581f333b1f: I'll tell you what. I heard a rumour that one of the fishermen down by the docks caught some weird looking fish as they were fishing the other day.
textByHash.5575a26781eab7b38ec27b9e8980f903ecdbd829: I never saw anything like that in my store before.
textByHash.5c4dc93c23ce25f82a1168af73b873f37899e34f: Ah. I see. I already told you. Some guy down by the docks was bragging. Best ask there, I reckon.
textByHash.6d4aa2054c58505335ab75c0e5f897cccd033cdb: Not hard. Just a trick to it. Takes skill to learn, but when learnt, easy. Sigli will be happy. Finest bowstring on continent. Will suit his needs perfectly.
textByHash.87af14036a73855d42fd3a1a4f10ac783fd98a3a: From what I hear this fish is unique. Nobody's ever seen its like before. This intrigues me. I'd like to have it for myself. Make a good trophy.
textByHash.b0729f83362668dcd780f0070b23a1916ad34282: This string you'll be wanting... Very rare. Take a lot of time to recreate. Not sure you have the cash for it.
textByHash.bad7180f391efe41ca528564e8b2e5fd3e884aee: Heh. Good thinking outerlander. Well, it's true, there is more to life than just making money. Making weapons is good money, but it's not why I do it.
textByHash.d5ba42fcaa515a5ddcfb9d07224b2e49c89385de: Ohh... That's a nice fish. Very pleased. Here. Take the bowstring. You fulfilled agreement. only fair I do same. Good work outerlander.
textByHash.e2da56483c479f55dd8b3e91b4dc58fd8a686295: You get me that fish, I give you the bowstring. What do you say? We got a deal?
